title: Vandalor

{{Quote|I'd love to stay and chat with you, but I have work to do.|Vandalor|<ref name="NDA">''[[Star Wars: The New Droid Army]]''</ref>}}
'''Vandalor''' was a [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] who once shared a romantic relationship with the [[Dark Acolyte/Legends|Dark Acolyte]] [[Sev'rance Tann/Legends|Sev'rance Tann]] before she chose to [[Sith apprentice/Legends|apprentice]] under [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. After their separation, he aligned himself with the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], taking on dangerous assignments across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. On one such [[Mission to Metalorn (Clone Wars)|mission]] to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Metalorn/Legends|Metalorn]], he was tasked with locating a cache of cortosis battle droids for the Separatists. However, his mission came to a violent end when he encountered [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], who [[Death/Legends|killed]] him in combat.

==Biography==
{{Quote|I'm going to to feel terrible when Vandalor destroys you. Claim your bounty, Vandalor!|Wat Tambor|<ref name="NDA" />}}
Vandalor was a [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who was the lover and ally of the [[Dark Acolyte/Legends|Dark Acolyte]] [[Sev'rance Tann/Legends|Sev'rance Tann]] during the [[Standard year/Legends|early years]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Like Tann, he entered the service of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] under [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]]'s leadership, acting as an enforcer and [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] for Separatist interests. In [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]]<ref name="Date"/>, Vandalor took part in the [[Coruscant Insurrection]]—an uprising in the lower levels of the galactic capital orchestrated to draw the attention of the Jedi Order away from key Separatist operations elsewhere. While operating in the Underlevels, Vandalor crossed paths with [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], resulting in a violent confrontation between the two. Though he managed to survive that encounter, his failure to complete his mission weakened his standing with his Separatist employers.<ref name="NDA" />

In the [[Standard month/Legends|months]] that followed, Vandalor was reassigned to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Metalorn/Legends|Metalorn]], serving as the [[Bodyguard/Legends|personal bodyguard]] to the [[Skakoan/Legends|Skakoan]] foreman and [[Techno Union/Legends|Techno Union]] executive [[Wat Tambor/Legends|Wat Tambor]]. When Republic forces, led by [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], launched an assault on Metalorn to disrupt cortosis production and Separatist [[Droid/Legends|droid]] manufacturing, Vandalor was once again confronted by the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]]. Despite his combat skill and Chiss discipline, he was ultimately overpowered and slain in battle by Skywalker, bringing an end to his service to the Confederacy and his connection to Sev’rance Tann.<ref name="NDA" />

==Personality==
Vandalor was a disciplined yet ruthless individual, shaped by both his Chiss heritage and his years of service to the Separatists. He possessed a strong sense of loyalty—particularly toward Sev’rance Tann—driven as much by personal devotion as by shared ambition. Calculating and composed in demeanor, Vandalor approached every mission with precision and tactical awareness, preferring efficiency over unnecessary brutality. However, his allegiance to the Confederacy and his willingness to execute their darker orders revealed a pragmatic, morally detached side. Despite his calm exterior, Vandalor harbored a deep resentment toward the Jedi, viewing them as hypocritical arbiters of a corrupt Republic. This animosity ultimately led to his downfall when he faced Anakin Skywalker in combat, where his confidence and determination could not match the Jedi's raw power.<ref name="NDA" />

==Equipment==
In combat, Vandalor employed a [[Jetpack/Legends|jetpack]] in conjunction with a white polearm. This polearm was unique in that rather than serving as a [[Melee weapon/Legends|melee weapon]], it was ranged, firing as a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] from one end and as a [[pulse-wave cannon]] from the other.<ref name="NDA" />
